metadata.title: Nearme:Chat&Date
metadata.short_description: Chat, share moments, and meet friends—discover connection right where you are.
metadata.long_description:
Nearme: The Social App Where Genuine Moments and Real Bonds Begin

Tired of social platforms that feel shallow or disconnected? Looking for a space where conversations go deeper than small talk and you can truly be yourself? Nearme is the social app designed to bring people closer by celebrating authenticity and fostering meaningful interactions.

In a crowded digital world, Nearme stands apart by focusing on real human connection rather than endless scrolling or surface-level impressions. It’s more than just adding contacts — it’s about meeting individuals who listen, understand, and value the person behind the profile.

💫 Nearme: Be Yourself, Build Real Ties
No filters, no pretenses. Nearme invites you to express your genuine side and connect with others who share your vibe. Our thoughtful matching approach highlights compatibility in both personality and passions, helping you find kindred spirits who truly “get” you.

💬 Start Conversations, Grow Friendships
When a connection sparks, Nearme’s smooth, private chat makes it easy to keep the dialogue flowing. Share experiences, exchange ideas, and uncover shared interests. Whether you’re seeking lasting friendships, cultural exchange, or a supportive circle, our chat tools empower you to nurture bonds that matter.

🌍 Discover People Near & Far
Nearme isn’t just a networking tool — it’s a thriving community. Explore voices from varied walks of life, backgrounds, and hobbies. Looking to broaden your horizons or simply meet inspiring individuals? Nearme opens doors to fresh perspectives and enriching encounters.

🛡️ Your Comfort, Our Commitment
We prioritize your well-being with robust privacy controls and active moderation, creating a respectful space free from unwanted behavior. Focus on connecting and enjoying new relationships while we safeguard your experience.

Ready to step into a social space where real people and sincere moments come first? Download Nearme today and start crafting friendships and connections that feel true. Let’s Nearme — and discover the joy of being genuinely seen.

versions.release_notes:
Fixed bugs.
The account deletion function has been modified to comply with policy requirements.
